//: run-queue merge-stage settings overlay template. Rendered with absolute paths at merge-stage spawn; passed via `claude -p --settings`. Unlike the review overlay, Write(*) and Edit(*) are NOT denied — /run-merge must resolve conflict markers in tracked source files. The guard hook (guard-queue-shell.sh, SPINE_QUEUE_STAGE=merge) blocks git push, git reset --hard, git commit --amend, and out-of-repo writes.
